title: Goldfussia geniculata
taxonomy: Goldfussia geniculata is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Goodeniaceae. It belongs to the genus Goldfussia. This plant is native to New Guinea and is often found in shaded areas. The classification of Goldfussia geniculata is further detailed at the level of order, family, genus, species, and cultivar. The specific classification can also be represented as Goodenia spp., or more specifically, Goodenia geniculata but then it is usually not referred to as Goldfussia.
